Package com.marswars.mechanisms

Class ElevatorMech

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.mechanisms.MechBase
com.marswars.mechanisms.ElevatorMech
All Implemented Interfaces:
SubsystemIoBase
public class ElevatorMech extends MechBase
Mechanism implementation for elevators with position, velocity, and duty cycle control.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElevatorMech

      public ElevatorMech(String logging_prefix, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double drum_radius, double carriage_mass_kg, double max_extension)
      Constructs a new ElevatorMech (assumes vertical elevator)
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      motor_configs - List of motor configurations
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      drum_radius - Radius of the drum in meters
      carriage_mass_kg - Mass of the elevator carriage in kg (Simulation only)
      max_extension - Maximum extension of the elevator in meters (Simulation only)

    • ElevatorMech

      public ElevatorMech(String logging_prefix, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double drum_radius, double carriage_mass_kg, double max_extension, double rigging_ratio)
      Constructs a new ElevatorMech
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      motor_configs - List of motor configurations
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      drum_radius - Radius of the drum in meters
      carriage_mass_kg - Mass of the elevator carriage in kg (Simulation only)
      max_extension - Maximum extension of the elevator in meters (Simulation only)
      rigging_ratio - Rigging ratio of the elevator

    • ElevatorMech

      public ElevatorMech(String logging_prefix, String mech_name, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double drum_radius, double carriage_mass_kg, double max_extension, double rigging_ratio)
      Constructs a new ElevatorMech
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      mech_name - Name of the mechanism
      motor_configs - List of motor configurations
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      drum_radius - Radius of the drum in meters
      carriage_mass_kg - Mass of the elevator carriage in kg (Simulation only)
      max_extension - Maximum extension of the elevator in meters (Simulation only)
      rigging_ratio - Rigging ratio of the elevator

    • ElevatorMech

      public ElevatorMech(String logging_prefix, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double drum_radius, double carriage_mass_kg, double max_extension, double rigging_ratio, boolean is_vertical)
      Constructs a new ElevatorMech
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      motor_configs - List of motor configurations
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      drum_radius - Radius of the drum in meters
      carriage_mass_kg - Mass of the elevator carriage in kg (Simulation only)
      max_extension - Maximum extension of the elevator in meters (Simulation only)
      rigging_ratio - Rigging ratio of the elevator
      is_vertical - Whether the elevator is vertical (affects gravity compensation in simulation)

    • ElevatorMech

      public ElevatorMech(String logging_prefix, String mech_name, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double drum_radius, double carriage_mass_kg, double max_extension, double rigging_ratio, boolean is_vertical)
      Constructs a new ElevatorMech
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      mech_name - Name of the mechanism
      motor_configs - List of motor configurations
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      drum_radius - Radius of the drum in meters
      carriage_mass_kg - Mass of the elevator carriage in kg (Simulation only)
      max_extension - Maximum extension of the elevator in meters (Simulation only)
      rigging_ratio - Rigging ratio of the elevator
      is_vertical - Whether the elevator is vertical (affects gravity compensation in simulation)

  • Method Details

    • readInputs

      public void readInputs(double timestamp)
      Read inputs from hardware or simulation
      Parameters:
      timestamp - the current timestamp

    • writeOutputs

      public void writeOutputs(double timestamp)
      Write outputs to hardware or simulation
      Parameters:
      timestamp - the current timestamp

    • logData

      public void logData()
      Log data to NetworkTables or other logging systems

    • configSlot

      public void configSlot(int slot, com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs config)
      Configures the given slot with the given config
      Parameters:
      slot - the slot to configure
      config - the slot config to apply

    • setCurrentPosition

      public void setCurrentPosition(double position)
      Sets the current position of the elevator (for zeroing purposes)
      Parameters:
      position - the position to set in meters

    • getCurrentPosition

      public double getCurrentPosition()
      Gets the current position of the elevator in meters
      Returns:
      the current position in meters

    • getCurrentVelocity

      public double getCurrentVelocity()
      Gets the current velocity of the elevator in meters per second
      Returns:
      the current velocity in meters per second

    • getLeaderCurrent

      public double getLeaderCurrent()
      Gets the current draw of the leader motor in amps
      Returns:
      the current draw of the leader motor in amps

    • setTargetPosition

      public void setTargetPosition(double position_m)
      Sets the target position of the elevator in meters
      Parameters:
      position_m - the target position in meters

    • setTargetVelocity

      public void setTargetVelocity(double velocity_mps)
      Sets the target velocity of the elevator in meters per second
      Parameters:
      velocity_mps - the target velocity in meters per second

    • setTargetDutyCycle

      public void setTargetDutyCycle(double duty_cycle)
      Sets the target duty cycle of the elevator
      Parameters:
      duty_cycle - the target duty cycle (-1.0 to 1.0)

    • applyLoadTorque

      public void applyLoadTorque(double torque_nm)
      Applies a load torque to the elevator mechanism for simulation purposes. This method should be called during the simulation update cycle to apply external loads (like friction, compression forces, etc.) to the mechanism.
      Parameters:
      torque_nm - The load torque in Newton-meters (Nm) at the drum output shaft. Positive values oppose motion in the positive direction.
